title: Financial Fraud Detection Dataset (2026)
subtitle: Labeled transactions with 25 features for fraud detection and anomaly analysis.
description: This dataset contains 1,500 financial transaction records across 10 countries, designed for binary fraud classification. Each record captures transaction metadata, temporal patterns, account history, device/behavioral signals, and merchant risk indicators. The fraud label (~0.8% positive rate) reflects real-world class imbalance, making it ideal for evaluating techniques like SMOTE, cost-sensitive learning, and anomaly detection.
sources: Synthetically generated using NumPy's random number generator (seed 42) to simulate financial transaction patterns across 10 countries. Feature distributions and fraud labeling logic modeled after real-world payment fraud patterns.
collection_methodology: Data generated programmatically. Transaction amounts sampled from log-normal distribution. Temporal features, device types, and country distributions calibrated to mirror production payment gateway traffic. Fraud labels assigned via logistic function over weighted risk signals (amount anomalies, off-hours activity, chargeback history, VPN usage, new device flags, merchant risk scores). Resulting ~0.8% fraud rate reflects real-world class imbalance.

resources.description: CSV file containing 1,500 financial transaction records with 25 columns covering transaction metadata, temporal patterns, account history, behavioral signals, and merchant risk scores. Includes a binary fraud_label target column with ~0.8% fraud rate. No missing values. Ready for classification, anomaly detection, and imbalanced learning workflows.

columns.name: transaction_type
columns.description: Type: purchase, subscription, transfer, cash_out, bill_payment

columns.name: merchant_category
columns.description: Category: electronics, fashion, grocery, travel, gaming, health, education, food_delivery, finance, utilities

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country code: US, UK, CA, DE, IN, AU, BR, FR, SG, AE

columns.name: prior_txn_24h
columns.description: Number of transactions in past 24 hours

columns.name: prior_txn_7d
columns.description: Number of transactions in past 7 days

columns.name: avg_amount_30d
columns.description: Average transaction amount over past 30 days

columns.name: failed_login_24h
columns.description: Failed login attempts in past 24 hours

columns.name: credit_score_band
columns.description: Credit quality: poor, fair, good, very_good, excellent

columns.name: is_foreign_txn
columns.description: 1 if transaction country differs from account country

columns.name: is_high_risk_country
columns.description: 1 if country is flagged high-risk (BR, AE)

columns.name: is_new_device
columns.description: 1 if device not previously associated with account
